Title: Microsoft 365 sign-in failure
UserReport: User can sign into Windows but Outlook and Teams repeatedly request credentials.
BusinessImpact: User cannot access email or meetings.
InitialClues: Windows sign-in works; issue started after password change; browser sign-in result unknown.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if account state is healthy but token or Conditional Access evidence indicates a tenant-side policy issue.

Title: OneDrive synchronization failure
UserReport: OneDrive shows a red X and files are not uploading.
BusinessImpact: User cannot share current project documents.
InitialClues: Storage quota unknown; path length and invalid file names not yet checked.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if local client reset and file checks succeed but service health or tenant configuration remains suspect.

Title: Intune device non-compliance
UserReport: Company Portal reports the device as non-compliant and access is blocked.
BusinessImpact: User cannot access protected corporate applications.
InitialClues: Device is Entra joined; last successful sync is unknown; BitLocker state must be checked.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if local compliance prerequisites are met but Intune still reports stale or conflicting policy state.

Title: Network printer unavailable
UserReport: The office printer is offline for one user while colleagues can still print.
BusinessImpact: Single user cannot print customer documents.
InitialClues: Printer IP may have changed; local port and queue state not yet verified.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if the printer is unreachable from multiple devices or print-server configuration requires administrative change.

Title: Windows Update repeatedly fails
UserReport: Updates download but installation fails and rolls back.
InitialClues: Disk space and update event codes must be collected; recent servicing changes unknown.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate when component corruption persists after approved local repair steps or a widespread update issue is confirmed.

Title: Repeated account lockout
UserReport: The user account locks several times each morning.
InitialClues: Old credentials may exist on another device, service, mapped drive, or mobile client.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate when lockout source points to a server, service account, application, or domain-controller issue outside desktop support scope.

Title: Intermittent internet connectivity
UserReport: The laptop disconnects from the internet several times per hour.
BusinessImpact: Calls and cloud applications are disrupted.
InitialClues: Other users are unaffected; wireless signal and adapter events need correlation.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if packet loss occurs beyond the endpoint, multiple users are affected, or infrastructure monitoring confirms an upstream issue.

Title: BitLocker recovery prompt
UserReport: The device requests a BitLocker recovery key after restart.
InitialClues: Recent firmware or hardware change is possible; recovery-key location must be validated through approved channels.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if no authorized recovery key is available or TPM and firmware changes require security review.

Title: Teams microphone unavailable
UserReport: Teams cannot detect the built-in microphone, but audio playback works.
BusinessImpact: User cannot participate verbally in meetings.
InitialClues: Windows privacy settings, selected Teams device, driver state, and exclusive access need review.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if the microphone fails across applications after driver and privacy checks or hardware diagnostics indicate failure.

Title: Group Policy not applying
UserReport: A required mapped drive and desktop setting are missing.
BusinessImpact: User cannot access a departmental share through the expected mapping.
InitialClues: Domain connectivity, OU placement, security filtering, and gpresult evidence are required.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if GPO scope or permissions require domain administrator changes.

Title: Domain trust relationship failure
UserReport: Windows reports that the trust relationship between the workstation and domain failed.
BusinessImpact: User cannot sign in with domain credentials.
InitialClues: Secure-channel state and computer-account health need validation.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate if the computer account is missing, duplicated, or secure-channel repair is not authorized.

Title: Suspicious sign-in report
UserReport: User received a sign-in alert from an unfamiliar location.
BusinessImpact: Possible account compromise and data exposure.
InitialClues: User activity, MFA prompts, sign-in timestamps, and session state need immediate review.
EscalationCriteria: Escalate immediately to security operations when activity is unrecognized or compromise indicators are present.
